texto: Love suffers long and is kind. Love does not parade itself, is not arrogant or rude, does not seek its own, thinks no evil; does not rejoice in iniquity, but rejoices in the truth. Love bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things.
explicacao: Citação de Stephanie Thornton sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Love suffers long and is kind. Love does not parade itself, is not arrogant or rude, does not see…” articula reflexao, love-quotes, things em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
